templates.name: Sandy Beach
templates.description: Golden sand stretches out as far as the eye can see, warm beneath your feet.

templates.name: Shallow Waves
templates.description: Cool, crystal-clear water laps gently at your ankles. Small fish dart between your feet.

templates.name: Deep Ocean
templates.description: The water quickly deepens into a vast, dark blue abyss. The current is strong here.

templates.name: Rocky Shore
templates.description: Jagged rocks form a natural barrier against the crashing surf.
